description: SIN-Axiom: Adaptive Model Router + Adapter Registry + Cache Layer

tools.name: axiom-route
tools.description: Routet Task-Type zum optimalen Modell (Micro/Mid/Heavy + Failure-Escalation).

params.name: task_type
params.description: Task-Type: classify_element, pick_answer, verify_state, classify_page, ocr_image, solve_math, analyze_new_provider

command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.router import AxiomRouter; r=AxiomRouter(); ctx={} if len(sys.argv)<3 else dict(x.split('=') for x in sys.argv[2].split(',')); cfg=r.route(sys.argv[1], ctx); print(cfg['name'])

tools.name: axiom-stats
tools.description: Zeigt Router-Stats: micro/mid/heavy Verteilung, estimated_cost, savings.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.router import AxiomRouter; import json; r=AxiomRouter(); print(json.dumps(r.get_stats(), indent=2))

tools.name: axiom-list-adapters
tools.description: Listet alle LoRA-Adapter aus dem Adapter-Registry mit Status.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.adapter_registry import AdapterRegistry; import json; r=AdapterRegistry(); print(json.dumps(r.list_adapters(), indent=2))

tools.name: axiom-best-adapter
tools.description: Findet den besten Adapter für einen Task-Hint.

params.name: task_hint
params.description: Task-Beschreibung, z.B. 'classify element in survey page'

command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.adapter_registry import AdapterRegistry; import json; r=AdapterRegistry(); best=r.best_for_task(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else ''); print(json.dumps(best, indent=2) if best else 'No adapter found')

tools.name: cache-query
tools.description: Prüft ob Intent/Screenshot bereits gecacht ist.

tools.name: sota-complexity
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; print(get_optimizer().estimate_complexity(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else '', ''))

tools.name: sota-best-model
tools.description: Gibt bestes Fireworks-Modell für Komplexitäts-Level zurück.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; print(get_optimizer().best_model_for_complexity(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else 'mid'))

tools.name: sota-stats
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-cost'); from stealth_cost import get_optimizer; import json; print(json.dumps(get_optimizer().stats(), indent=2))

tools.name: config-get
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-config'); from stealth_config import get_config; print(get_config().get(sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else ''))

tools.name: axiom-set-active-adapter
tools.description: Aktiviert einen bestimmten Adapter fuer nachfolgende Inferenzen.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.adapter_registry import AdapterRegistry; r=AdapterRegistry(); r.activate(sys.argv[1]); print(f'adapter {sys.argv[1]} active')

tools.name: axiom-analyze-with-adapter
tools.description: Fuehrt eine tiefe Analyse mit dem besten LoRA-Adapter durch.
command: import sys; sys.path.insert(0,'/Users/jeremy/dev/stealth-axiom'); from stealth_axiom.adapter_registry import AdapterRegistry; r=AdapterRegistry(); a=r.best_for_task(sys.argv[1]); print(f'best adapter: {a.get(\"adapter_id\",\"none\") if a else \"none\"}')
